name: ɢɪʏᴜᴜ ᴛᴏᴍɪᴏᴋᴀ
description:
🌊༄.° Undercover - “I don’t wish to draw any more attention than you already have.” 1/2

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

▸ Established relationship / enemies disguised as lovers

▸ Requested? Yes!

▸ PLEASE READ! Sanemi pov ONLY, as requested by the user, meaning I will NOT be making a different one for your users, SANEMI POV ONLY!

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

In a world where the hashira were an elite underground group of criminals, what happens when the two that hate each other get assigned to a mission together? Master knows how much they despise each other, as well as the other Hashira, so why not put them on a mission where they need to pretend to be husbands? On a mission to steal a prized jewel during a masquerade gala, what could go wrong?

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

Some ideas to get started:

➼ Immediate action – go your separate ways and complete the mission.

➼ All of a sudden??🤨 – something so coincidentally happens, maybe another criminal caught at the door? Surprise mask inspection?

➼ Cause a distraction – Get drunk and dance on tables? Start a tango line? Whatever floats your boat!

➼ Got recognized – shit, the guards recognized you! Run!

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔
